svg.text: AI-based Brain Tumor Detection Platform • Professional Medical Workflow Diagram

g.text: Launch the intelligent medical web platform
Secure account access for patients and operators
Validate identity and authorize protected access
User submits brain MRI image for AI analysis
Check file type, integrity, size, and scan usability
Prepare the MRI for standardized model input
Align scan dimensions with CNN backbone requirements
Reduce noise and scale pixel intensities consistently
AI inference runs on MRI features and learned patterns
Final class decision from the multi-class prediction head
Visualize the critical regions influencing AI prediction
Highlight suspected tumor zone with contour-driven overlay
Interpret prediction certainty and estimated clinical priority
Persist scan outcome, analytics, patient context, and model metadata
Refresh visual analytics and append user scan timeline
Package findings, visuals, and recommendations into report form
Present diagnosis output, heatmaps, confidence, and generated report

svg.text: Secure access • Smart preprocessing • Deep learning classification • Explainability • Segmentation • Reporting

g.text: Medical-grade presentation style for project and IEEE documentation
Neon blue clinical UI with vertical flow and process-linked arrows
Ready for report export, slide decks, and system methodology explanation
